title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0129 Second Floor Flat, 224 Bath Road, Bristol, BS4 3EQ
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Ross Caltabiano  Site address:  Second Floor Flat, 224 Bath Road, Bristol, BS4 3EQ  Description of proposed development:  Conversion of top floor flat into a House in Multiple Occupation (Use Class C4) with rear roof extension and associated works.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 21 November 2025   Date by when representations must be made 31 December 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 16 January 2026   Decision date TBC     Decision  Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 31 December 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT,  69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0129 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Preliminary Bat Roost Assessment  (PDF, 693 KB, 8 pages)  Sustainability Statement  (PDF, 911 KB, 9 pages)  Application Form  (PDF, 944 KB, 13 pages)  BNG Exemption Statement  (PDF, 9.42 MB, 3 pages)  CIL Form 1  (PDF, 474 KB, 6 pages)  Covering Ltr PR02714  (PDF, 1.51 MB, 10 pages)  PL01 Existong Floor Plans  (PDF, 351 KB, 1 page)  PL02A Proposed Floor Plans  (PDF, 503 KB, 1 page)  PL03A Existing and Proposed Site Plans  (PDF, 546 KB, 1 page)  PL04 Location Plan  (PDF, 189 KB, 1 page)  PL05A Existing and Proposed Sections  (PDF, 657 KB, 1 page)  PL06C Existing and Proposed Elevations  (PDF, 330 KB, 1 page)   Questionnaire and supporting documents   BCS18 - Housing Type  (PDF, 1.24 MB, 3 pages)  BCS21 - Quality Urban Design  (PDF, 1.27 MB, 5 pages)  Bristol City Council - NOT liable for...
